action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 22's k-NN feature-extraction training succeeded (~92s), but the command failed at the verification step because `cp /data/val.pt dummy_test/test.pt` attempted to copy onto the same file (likely a hardlink from a prior iteration). The checkpoint at checkpoints/model.pt is valid and contains 45k cached features. Analysis: No evaluation has been submitted for the k-NN approach yet. I need to verify predict.py runs correctly with a properly created dummy test file, then immediately submit for evaluation. If k-NN underperforms the 83.11% best, I can tune k or revert to the linear-head recipe in later iterations. Decision: Create a fresh dummy test subset, run predict.py to confirm output format, then submit the k-NN checkpoint for evaluation.
